rationale: Article VIII, §51-d governs survivor assistance for public servants who die in hazardous duty. It does not address residence homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so the proposed change does not conflict with this provision.
quote: Sec. 51-d. ASSISTANCE TO SURVIVORS OF PUBLIC SERVANT SUFFERING DEATH IN PERFORMANCE OF HAZARDOUS DUTY.
_note: No conflict; the cited constitutional provision is unrelated to homestead exemptions.
